# Nortix

> Nortix is a Minecraft server discovery and playtesting platform for players and server owners.

Canonical website: https://hub.nortixlabs.com

## What Nortix does

- Helps players discover verified Minecraft Java and Bedrock servers.
- Offers optional, moderated playtesting campaigns with clear milestones.
- Eligible activity may receive up to the published Sparks limit after backend verification.
- Gives server owners privacy-conscious discovery, acquisition, activation, retention, milestone, and feedback analytics.
- Requires an account to publish a server or join and contribute to campaigns.

## Rewards

Sparks are non-withdrawable, non-transferable platform points with no cash value. Published Sparks amounts are upper limits, not guarantees. Nortix does not present player earnings or cash rewards.

## Public resources

- Server directory: https://hub.nortixlabs.com/servers
- Campaign directory: https://hub.nortixlabs.com/campaigns
- Player guide: https://hub.nortixlabs.com/how-it-works
- Server owner guide: https://hub.nortixlabs.com/for-server-owners
- Trust and safety: https://hub.nortixlabs.com/safety
- Community guidelines: https://hub.nortixlabs.com/guidelines
- Privacy: https://hub.nortixlabs.com/privacy
- Terms: https://hub.nortixlabs.com/terms
- Contact: https://hub.nortixlabs.com/contact

## Attribution

Nortix is operated by Nortix Labs and is not affiliated with Mojang Studios or Microsoft.
